_doc: Prop-account economics ledger: what accounts cost vs what payouts came back. Hand-curated durable record (tracked in git, like journals). cost_usd null = fee not yet recorded — fill in real numbers, never estimates. Rendered by the Situation Room's Ledger panel (personal edition only).

accounts.label: $50k eval #1
accounts.notes: Active by 2026-06-24 (first journal); purchase date and fee not recorded. Passed 2026-07-07 (~$53,360 final), funded account issued same day.

accounts.label: $50k funded (sim)
accounts.notes: Issued on eval #1 pass; +$3,244.24 day one. Blown between 2026-07-13 and 2026-07-16 (journals for that stretch outstanding — exact date and any activation fee unrecorded). No payout was ever taken.

accounts.label: $50k eval #2 (1/2)
accounts.notes: Bought as a pair on CPI day; +~$1k day one; blown 2026-07-16.

accounts.label: $50k eval #3 (2/2)
accounts.notes: Second of the CPI-day pair; +$906.20 on 07-15; blown 2026-07-16.

accounts.label: $50k eval #4
accounts.notes: Instant re-buy the morning both CPI-day evals blew; itself blown next day — the last Tradeify account.

accounts.label: $50k Builder #1
accounts.notes: Balance $53,272.24 hit 2026-07-17 = target reached; pass pending MFFU EOD sync, funded phase to follow. No payouts possible until funded.

accounts.label: $50k Builder #2
accounts.notes: Second Builder of the pair; untracked so far (no trades logged against it).
